metadata.description: 面向实战营销工作流的 skills market。A skills marketplace for practical marketing workflows.

plugins.name: marketing-skills
plugins.description: 营销技能包：用于消费者洞察、产品概念、活动简报、内容规划和上市推广工作流。Marketing skills for consumer insight, product concepts, campaign briefs, content planning, and go-to-market workflows.
